name: 11L Int6 QAT + Per-Dim SmearGate + SWA + Decoupled WD 0.038
author: Joshua Juneau
blurb: 11 layers with int6 per-row QAT (STE) on MLP+attention, int8 tok_emb, zstd-22. Muon WD 0.038 for quantization-friendly weights. SWA ~29-30 checkpoint average. Per-dim SmearGate. OrthoInit. Sliding window eval stride=64, seq=2048. 3-seed mean 1.1480.
